metadata.title: Services | Andrea Losavio
metadata.description: Expertise, strategy, and practical solutions to help startups and companies grow confidently

hero.title: Services for <highlight>startups</highlight> and <highlight>companies</highlight>
hero.description: Offering expertise, strategy, and practical solutions to help startups and companies grow confidently

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: I integrate into your team with a product-oriented mindset. I don't just write code: I bring experience, propose solutions, and actively contribute to building a solid product that drives your company's growth.
collaboration.useCase1: Companies wanting to build solid and scalable foundations
collaboration.useCase2: Growing teams needing to raise the technical bar
collaboration.useCase4: Teams looking for an active contributor

validationMvp.title: Validation & MVP
validationMvp.description: Rapidly transform your idea into a functional Minimum Viable Product (MVP). I define the essential scope, eliminate superfluous features, and provide a concrete tool for market testing, real feedback collection, and securing your next funding round with minimal effort and risk.
validationMvp.useCase1: Ideas to validate on the market
validationMvp.useCase4: Projects with limited budget and timeline

auditConsulting.title: Audit & Consulting
auditConsulting.description: I conduct in-depth analysis of your architecture, code, and team workflows. I provide a detailed report on Technical Debt, bottlenecks, and risks, along with a prioritized action plan to increase stability, development speed, and operational cost efficiency.

fractionalCto.title: Fractional CTO
fractionalCto.description: Gain Executive-Level Technical Leadership without the burden of a full-time executive. Strategic guidance, resource management, technical hiring, and alignment of the IT roadmap with business goals to ensure a solid and scalable direction.

technicalMentorship.title: Technical Mentorship
technicalMentorship.description: Offering personalized guidance and hands-on support to help teams strengthen their technical skills, adopt best practices, improve workflows, and make informed engineering decisions, ensuring scalable, maintainable, and high-quality products.
technicalMentorship.useCase2: Teams wanting to adopt best practices

productDevelopment.title: Product Development
productDevelopment.description: Full-Stack Service for the complete creation of digital products. From UX/UI design to cloud deployment, I manage the entire development lifecycle for robust, scalable, and results-oriented web and mobile applications.
productDevelopment.useCase1: Digital products to build from scratch

contactForm.title: Looking for something else?
contactForm.description: Let me know what you're looking for. I'm happy to help or discuss custom solutions
contactForm.challengePlaceholder: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt
contactForm.consent: I consent to the processing of my personal data for the purpose of receiving a response to my message
contactForm.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out! I'll get back to you within 24-48 hours.
contactForm.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact me directly.

serviceDialog.title: Interested in {service}?
serviceDialog.description: Fill out the form below and I'll get back to you within 24-48 hours to discuss your needs.
